title: ORDI Token Explodes 179% in 24 Hours, Reaches $8.70 as Bitcoin Ordinals Gain Momentum
excerpt: ORDI, the native token of the Bitcoin Ordinals protocol, has surged dramatically by 179% in the past 24 hours to reach $8.70. The explosive price movement reflects growing interest in Bitcoin-based NFTs and digital artifacts as the Ordinals ecosystem continues to expand.
